title: abutilon simulans
intro: Abutilon simulans, also known as the sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. The health benefits of Abutilon simulans include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Abutilon simulans can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
